top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.atom_id BETWEEN 21 AND 25;

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.atom_id BETWEEN 21 AND 25
AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.atom_id BETWEEN 21 AND 25;

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.atom_id >= 21 AND a.atom_id <= 25
AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.atom_id BETWEEN 21 AND 25
AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.atom_id BETWEEN 21 AND 25;

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.atom_id >= 21 AND a.atom_id <= 25
AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.atom_id BETWEEN 21 AND 25
AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.atom_id BETWEEN 21 AND 25;
